content.en:
Qinglian Giant City.

The white-bearded man came to Ye Tian's residence, and Ye Tian naturally invited the white-bearded old man to come in as a guest for the first time.

"Old man with white beard, please be seated!"

Ye Tian said politely.

After his will broke through to the eighth order, he had already roughly seen the strength realm of the white-bearded old man.

He had always guessed that the old man with white beard was the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lord, but now he knew that he had guessed wrong, the white-bearded old man was not a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lord, but a higher half-step eternal master.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian is still far inferior to the white-bearded old man.

The white-bearded old man naturally sensed Ye Tian's eighth-order eternal will, and immediately congratulated: "Congratulations to the Endless Lord for advancing to the eighth-order!"

"It's a fluke!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

Soon, the white-bearded old man explained his intention.

"No" Seven-two-three, "Lord Du, I heard that you went to the Banya Ancient Pagoda and broke through to the ninth level?" asked the white-bearded old man curiously.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded and acknowledged.

The white-bearded old man stroked his beard and sighed: "I think I have also been to the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda at the beginning, but unfortunately I only passed the sixth level, if you come out of the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda this time, I am afraid that you will be favored by many Eternal Masters, and it is certain that you will be accepted as a personal disciple by the Eternal Masters." "

"Let's talk about it later. "

Ye Tian said.

He has no plans to apprentice now, mainly because he may not be able to attract a very powerful Eternal Master, and if it is an ordinary Eternal Master, such as the kind that has not been promoted for a long time, he may not be able to help him much.

After all, there are many personal disciples and heirs of many Eternal Controllers, so they still can't be promoted to half-step Eternal Masters.

So, at his level, he relies more on himself.

Of course, there are many benefits to really learning from a powerful Eternal Master.

Afterwards, Ye Tian chatted with the white-bearded old man for a long time.

At this time, the white-bearded old man said: "It's a pity that the Qinglian controller doesn't accept apprentices, otherwise, you can completely apprentice to the Qinglian master." "

"Even if I don't apprentice, I still have the hope of becoming the Eternal Master!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

"Of course!" said the white-bearded old man.

"Old man with white beard, you should already be a half-step Eternal Master, do you want to consider impacting the Eternal Master?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

The white-bearded old man shook his head, "For the time being, I won't impact the Eternal Master, my accumulation is not enough, if I go to the impact now, there will be a sixty percent failure rate, once it fails, it will fall, and no one can avoid it." "

Ye Tian nodded, it would be better to be cautious, if he was not sure that he would impact as an eternal controller, he would not have impacted.

Moreover, the white-bearded old man has a good mentality, and he doesn't have any big enemies, even if he stays in the realm of a half-step uncontrolled person forever, it is quite good.

After the white-bearded old man left, Ye Tian also condensed a copy body and left the Qinglian Giant City, his copy body was ready to continue to find the copy control level ancestor Fu.

Ye Tian felt that the more control-level ancestral endowments he copied, maybe he would have a chance to pass the ninth level.

Regardless, he did everything in his power to get through the ninth level.

Time flies, and several years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had a lot of harvest.

After his continuous search and investigation, and in the case of losing one copy of the body, he entered a number of Boundary River forbidden places, I don't know how many places he has been, and finally copied to the six master-level ancestors.

These six mastery-level ancestors are the mastery-level water ancestor, the mastery-level wood ancestor, the mastery-level aurora ancestor, the mastery-level pupil ancestor, the mastery-level gravity ancestor, and the mastery-level thunder ancestor.

Coupled with the several mastery-level ancestral endowments obtained before, Ye Tian now has a lot of mastery-level ancestral endowments.

There are more mastery-level ancestral endowments, so that Ye Tian's talent and qualifications are naturally more powerful, and when he comprehends the secret technique of the ninth level, the effect has also improved a lot.

However, Ye Tian still felt that there was some danger, and he was afraid that he might not be able to comprehend this secret technique before the arrival of the Ten Realm River Years.

"If you copy it to a master-level ancestor again, maybe it's almost the same!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Still, he had good luck.

On this day, Ye Tian heard that the Night Tyrant in the Boundary River had grabbed a Boundary River life comparable to a half-step controller level from a certain place in the Boundary River, and used it as the bearer of the Night Giant City, carrying the Night Giant City to swim in the Boundary River.

Thereupon.

After Ye Tian heard about it, he went over for the first time, wanting to see if the life of this boundary river was extraordinary..........

After all, the Boundary River life that can be targeted by the Eternal Master, is definitely not an ordinary half-step Eternal Master.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Night Giant City.

I saw a life of the Boundary River that looked like a big fish, swimming in the Boundary River, and on its back was the Night Giant City.

When Ye Tian approached the other party, he immediately urged the copying talent.

He had also spied on many half-step Eternal Controller Realm River lifeforms, but none of them controlled the Ancestral Endowment.

In the Boundary River, the mastery-level ancestral endowment is also extremely rare.

But this time, Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

"I really have a mastery-level ancestor!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Mastery Ancestor: Devour

The control-level devouring ancestral endowment was also quite a good master-level talent, and Ye Tian immediately copied it.

Then he left in silence.

Soon after, Ye Tian had completely fused the Mastery-level Devouring Ancestral Fu, and all the copied bodies had the Mastery-level Devouring Ancestral Fu.

Half-toothed ancient tower, the ninth level.

Ye Tian added a new mastery-level devouring ancestral endowment, and the effect of comprehending the secret art has increased a little.

At this moment, although he is still contemplating the past, he can remember more things, according to this contemplation effect, he has a ninety percent hope that he will be able to completely comprehend this secret technique when the ten realms of the river year comes, so as to pass the ninth level.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had been in the Banya Ancient 5.1 Tower for a full nine realms.

On this day, Ye Tian copied another mastery-level ancestral endowment - Extreme Flame!

However, Ye Tian was already about to comprehend this secret technique, and one more control-level ancestor was just faster, even if he didn't copy this control-level ancestor, he could still realize it.

After about a tenth of the years had passed, Ye Tian finally realized it completely.

Rumble!!!!

A ray of light entered the core of Ye Tian's will from above the scroll map.

In an instant, Ye Tian had an extra mark on his body.

At the same time, he also comprehended a secret art!

Ye Tian was immersed in it, and immediately felt the power of this secret technique.

It can be said that after obtaining this secret art, his strength and potential have reached a higher level. _
